description: Slide Insurance Holdings, Inc. provides property and casualty insurance services in the United States. The company writes coastal specialty personal lines insurance, including homeowners, condominium unit owners, commercial residential, and other products, as well as offers reinsurance and insurance agency services. Slide Insurance Holdings, Inc. was incorporated in 2021 and is headquartered in Tampa, Florida.
